response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, or network security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware — all core requirements. Their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no evidence of embedded networking, hardware control, or Japanese language proficiency.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling
Proven ability to learn and apply diverse technologies in complex systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C programming in embedded or UNIX environments
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or network security protocol implementation
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
